intent: Add per-IP rate limiting to the login route to slow credential-stuffing attacks.
blast_radius: every request to POST /login now passes through new middleware
introduces a new shared in-memory store

planted_issues.description: The middleware fails open: if the counter store throws, the request is let through, so a store fault silently disables rate limiting.
The counter lives in process memory, so it resets on restart and is not shared across instances/replicas.
